name.full: Durable Agent Workflows for M365 Copilot

description.short: IT triage, agent evaluation, and document review via MAF durable workflows.
description.full: Three enterprise durable workflows exposed as MCP tools via Azure Functions: IT Helpdesk Triage (parallel sentiment/category/KB analysis with manager approval), Agent Evaluation Pipeline (parallel safety/accuracy/groundedness/relevance scoring with human review), and Document Review Pipeline (parallel legal/compliance/brand/technical review with author revision and final approval gates). Built with Microsoft Agent Framework and Durable Task Scheduler.
